      Buy God of War CD Key Compare Prices

      • Info
      • About
      • Config
      • News
      • Feed

      WHAT IS A God of War KEY OR STEAM KEY?

      A God of War Key (also known as a God of War Steam Key, CD Key or Digital Code) is an official activation code that allows you to activate, download, and play God of War PC on official platforms: Epic Store, GoG, Steam. Depending on the store, the code may be for Steam or the publisher's own platform.

      WHAT IS THE BEST God of War PRICE FOR PC?

      The best price for God of War PC is 14.79€ at Instant Gaming, with 26% Off. We'll show you all the available promo codes and Instant Gaming coupons to help you save money. Compare and find the best God of War price from 33 trusted stores with 55 offers. Whether you're searching for God of War cheap offers, best deals, or a specific God of War key, use our exclusive discount codes to get the best price.

      Release date
      14 January 2022
      Official website
      godofwar.playstation.com
      Developer
      Santa Monica Studio
      Publisher
      Playstation Publishing Llc
      Activation
      Epic store , Gog , Steam
      Platforms
      PC, PS4, PS5
      PEGI
      18
      Tags
      Action Adventure RPG Hack and Slash Exploration Souls-like ... Third Person 3D Fantasy Atmospheric Emotional Mythology Open World Story Rich Combat PvE Singleplayer

      About God of War

      God of War is the 8th installment of the God of War series and is the sequel to God of War III.

       
      • A new adventure awaits, and this time it is centered on Norse mythology, not unlike the previous God of War games that are loosely based on Greek mythology.
      • It has been years since Kratos took vengeance on the Greek gods. He was able to survive the final encounter with his father Zeus, however, he now lives in the land of the Norse gods with his son Atreus.
      • His newfound role as a father figure to his son will have him protecting, as well as teaching, his son the ropes of survival.
      • This time around, Kratos will not have his double-chained blades but will instead wield a magical battle ax called the Leviathan Axe.
      • This new installment is also played single-player only with Atreus helping Kratos from time to time.

      God of War Reviews

      It all adds up to the most definitive version of one of the finest adventures the God of War has ever taken. If you’re thinking of diving into God of War, this is the best, most elegant way to play it. Opt for the PC version over the PlayStation 4 title – and enjoy a splendid ride.

      New York Daily News

       

      How impressive God of War is on PC really gives credit to Santa Monica Studio’s work on this game. It’s still a gorgeous journey through a unique take on Norse mythology, and a great way to play the game for the first time or revisit it before God of War Ragnarok releases. I’m as impressed with it now as I was the first time through it, and I look forward to seeing what’s in store for Kratos and Atreus in the sequel.

      Game Revolution

       

      The end product here shows that PlayStation is becoming much more experienced with this PC porting process, which isn’t just a great thing for God of War, but it bodes well for the company’s future plans in this space.

      Comicbook.com

      Minimum System Requirements:

      • OS: Windows 10 (64 bits)
      • CPU: Intel i5-2500k, 4 core 3.3 GHz, AMD Ryzen 3 1200, 4 core 3.1 GHz
      • RAM: 8 GB
      • HDD: 70 GB
      • GPU: NVIDIA GTX 960, AMD R9 290X
      • DirectX: 11

      Recommended System Requirements:

      • OS: Windows 10 (64 bits)
      • CPU: Intel i5-6600k, 4 core 3.5 GHz, AMD Ryzen 5 2400 G, 4 core 3.6 GHz
      • RAM: 8 GB
      • HDD: 70 GB
      • GPU: NVIDIA GTX 1060, AMD RX 570
      • DirectX: 11

      Gaming News
      • 20d
        Clair Obscur: Expedition 33 actor Ben Starr says live-action Street Fighter or God of War adaptations aren't necessary, since "I don't think video games need to justify their existence by being TV shows"
      • 1m
        Next God of War Features Multiple Mythologies — Report
      • 1m
        Next God of War game will explore multiple mythologies, report suggests
      • 1m
        Rumor: God Of War Spin-Off Will See Faye Exploring Multiple Mythologies
      • 1m
        Rumor: New Mainline God Of War “Due To Be Announced Very Soon”
      • 1m
        OG God of War actor has a message for "all you men": He thinks the sex scenes will be back in the Greek trilogy remake
      • 1m
        Kratos Voice Actor TC Carson Believes The Spicy “Mini-Games” Are Returning In God Of War Trilogy Remake
      • 1m
        God of War Greek trilogy's Kratos actor T.C. Carson says Sony Santa Monica "realized that they let me go prematurely," but "they came back" to him for the remake
      • 1m
        God Of War Trilogy Remake Release Date Speculation, Trailers, And Everything Else We Know
      • 1m
        God of War's pale hero Kratos is covered in ash because a lead dev saw unfinished concept art on white paper and thought it was "really cool"
      • 1m
        Amazon's God of War series finds its Queen of the Valkyries Freya in Lost and For All Mankind actress
      • 1m
        God of War TV Series Adds Lost Star Sonya Walger as Freya
      • 1m
        After that controversial first look, God of War TV show casts its Freya
      • 1m
        Former God of War dev thinks "the plan was to do Egyptian at some point," but Sony Santa Monica went with Norse mythology for the reboot as it was "familiar but not familiar"
      • 1m
        OG God of War devs didn't expect the PS2 classic to take 4 years to make, but they "didn't know any better" and "crunched like motherf***ers"
      • 2m
        Rumor: Shpeshal Nick Claims God Of War Spinoff’s Name Is “Pretty Cool”
      • 2m
        Women Helped Make God Of War’s Spiciest “Mini-Games”
      • 2m
        God of War's infamous sex minigames were actually "designed by women", former Sony Santa Monica writer Alanah Pearce reveals
      • 2m
        "The God of War sex mini-games were designed by women," former Sony Santa Monica writer says, which is why Aphrodite's bed looks "like a labia"
      • 2m
        God of War game creator doesn't hold back, says Prime Video series first look is "terrible", but he has "no doubt it is going to be a good show"

      God of War Price and Historical Lows

      Our PC game price tracker makes it easy to compare offers from official stores and CD Key sites from United Kingdom, United States of America, and Europe. Keep an eye on God of War price trends on PC, and be alerted when the game drops to your desired best price in British pounds (GBP), US Dollars (USD) and Euros (EUR). Never miss out on the cheapest deal or a God of War price drop again.

      No history yet.

      We don't know anything about God of War's price history.

      Cancel comment

      You must be logged in to post a comment.

      Riri from Allkeyshop 2 years ago
      5 / 5

      Sometimes a merchant may sell an account with the game you want to be connected to that account. Buying an account is often much cheaper than buying a game key or activation code. To download the game, follow these simple steps: - Login to the account with the details given to you by the seller. - Download the game to your PC. - Play the game! Remember to change the password for this new Steam account and the associated email. Family sharing is also an option, which allows you to play the game directly from your own account.

      Log in to Reply
      Quark 2 years ago
      4 / 5

      The reboot of the God of War series is a triumph. The shift to Norse mythology, the more mature storytelling, and the deep combat system make for a thrilling adventure.

      Log in to Reply
      Clxtch 3 years ago
      5 / 5

      after playing ragnarok, and this now being on pc.. I really gotta play this

      Log in to Reply
      Marius 3 years ago
      5 / 5

      I loved this game so much that I played it when it launched on ps4 and on pc, both times 100% completion

      Log in to Reply
      Rie 3 years ago
      5 / 5

      Combat is awesome, Graphics look good, Story is fantastic, I love it. Just one thing, the bosses are almost always the same.

      AllKeyShop.com is a price comparison website that provides information and links to third-party online stores. We do not sell any products directly, nor are we involved in the sale or transaction process between users and the linked merchants. AllKeyShop.com is not affiliated with, associated with, authorized by, endorsed by, or in any way officially connected with Santa Monica Studio, Playstation Publishing Llc, God of War or any of their subsidiaries or affiliates. The official God of War website can be found at: https://godofwar.playstation.com/ The names God of War, Santa Monica Studio, Playstation Publishing Llc as well as related names, marks, emblems, and images, are registered trademarks of their respective owners. The prices on this site are for informational and comparative purposes only, consistent with fair use principles for identification or reference under applicable trademark laws in the EU (including those outlined in EU Regulation 2017/1001, Article 14), the UK, and the US.

      Important Considerations for Users:

      Accuracy of Information: While we strive to provide accurate and up-to-date information, prices, availability, and other product details on linked external websites can change rapidly. We recommend verifying all information directly on the merchant's website before making any purchase. Third-Party Websites: We are not responsible for the content, privacy practices, or accuracy of information on any third-party websites linked from AllKeyShop.com. Your interactions and transactions with these external sites are solely at your own risk and subject to their terms and conditions. No Endorsement: The inclusion of a link to a third-party website does not imply endorsement or recommendation by AllKeyShop.com of that website or its products/services.
